Export RoweOS

Export Summary
Developer: Reset All Data
⚠️ Warning: This action cannot be undone
This will completely wipe:
  • All brands and their configurations
  • All API keys and provider settings
  • All generated content and conversations
  • All onboarding progress
  • Everything in localStorage
The app will reload as if it's a fresh install, allowing you to test the complete onboarding experience.

Are you absolutely sure you want to proceed?

Type RESET to confirm:

Update History

v12.0.9 CURRENT
• Full Products & Services inventory system with images
• Product image upload: direct, from Library, from Studio
• Studio Subject Selector: attach inventory/library items
• Save generated images directly to product/service
• Nanobanana 3.0 image-to-image generation
• Enhanced inventory cards with image previews
• All emojis replaced with SVG icons
v10.5.25 — Studio UI/UX Overhaul
• Complete Studio layout redesign
• Workspace (top) / Output (bottom) vertical split
• Resizable panels (drag handle between sections)
• Image-optimized output panel
• Mobile responsive with stacked layout
• Touch support for panel resizing
v9.1.14 — Guardrails & Onboarding
• Guardrails glassmorphism redesign
• Version history in System → About
• Clone Brand & Export consolidated
• Onboarding document extraction for all 7 Identity fields
v9.1.0 — Identity & Firebase
• Identity view with 7-section brand cards
• AI-assisted brand profiling
• Firebase real-time sync
• Dynamic BrandAI system prompts
v9.0.0 — Platform Restructure
• 3-tier navigation (Intelligence / Commerce / Governance)
• Commerce view with invoicing & clients
• Inventory management system
• Pulse analytics dashboard
v8.1.x — AI Image Generation
• DALL-E 3 integration in Studio
• Image Agent for visual content
• Brand Mood Board & Visual Kit ops
• Custom Agent creation
• 4 onboarding paths (Template, Custom, Website, Upload)
v8.0.0 — Foundation
• Live streaming AI responses
• Multi-provider support (Claude, GPT, Gemini)
• StandardAI neutral mode
• Agent Studio with 42+ operations
• Library file management

Cloud Sync Setup

Sync your brands across all devices with Firebase. Follow the steps below to set up your cloud backend.

1
Create Firebase Project
›
  1. Go to console.firebase.google.com
  2. Click "Create a project" (or "Add project")
  3. Enter a project name (e.g., roweos-yourname)
  4. Disable Google Analytics (optional) → Click Continue
  5. Wait for project creation → Click Continue
2
Add Web App & Get Config
›
  1. On the project overview, click the Web icon </>
  2. App nickname: RoweOS
  3. Leave "Firebase Hosting" unchecked → Click Register app
  4. Copy the firebaseConfig object (the part inside { })
  5. Click Continue to console
{
  "apiKey": "AIza...",
  "authDomain": "your-app.firebaseapp.com",
  "projectId": "your-app",
  ...
}
3
Enable Google Sign-In
›
  1. In Firebase Console, go to Build → Authentication
  2. Click Get started
  3. Click on Google in the providers list
  4. Toggle Enable ON
  5. Select your email as the support email
  6. Click Save
4
Create Firestore Database
›
  1. In Firebase Console, go to Build → Firestore Database
  2. Click Create database
  3. Select Start in production mode → Click Next
  4. Choose location: nam5 (us-central) → Click Enable
5
Set Security Rules
›
  1. In Firestore, click the Rules tab
  2. Replace the existing rules with:
rules_version = '2'; service cloud.firestore { match /databases/{database}/documents { match /roweos_users/{userId} { allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == userId; } } }
  1. Click Publish
6
Add Authorized Domain
›
  1. Go to Build → Authentication → Settings tab
  2. Scroll to Authorized domains
  3. Click Add domain
  4. Add your app's domain (e.g., roweos.vercel.app or your-app.vercel.app)
  5. Click Add
⚠️ This step is required or you'll get an "unauthorized domain" error when signing in.
Connected to Firebase
user@example.com
Project: roweos

Home Guardrails
Guardrails

Define agent scopes, behavioral boundaries, and content rules for your brands.

BrandAI Main System Prompt

Core directive for BrandAI chat - This is the master prompt that defines how BrandAI responds

How to Customize:
1. Click "Edit" to make changes
2. Scroll to the END of the prompt
3. ADD your custom instructions there (don't delete the brand context!)
4. Click "Save Changes"

Important: The full prompt should be 2000+ characters (includes all brand details). If yours is much shorter, click "Reset to Default" and start over.

LifeAI Main System Prompt

Preview of the current coach's directive - Updates automatically when you switch coaches

How Personalization Works:
This prompt defines how your current coach behaves. Your personal context from Identity is automatically injected at runtime.

To personalize: Go to Identity → fill out your profile, and LifeAI will learn about you over time through conversations.

Brand Settings
Edit in Identity → Brand Essence
Abbreviated name shown in the brand switcher. Leave empty to use full name.
Edit in Identity → Brand Essence
Tip: All other brand details (voice, tone, messaging, etc.) are managed in the Identity section. Use the expandable cards there to edit your brand's full profile.
Delete Brand

Are you sure you want to delete ?

This will permanently remove all brand data, including identity, memory, files, and configurations. This action cannot be undone.

Import/Export Brands
Export Brand Data

Download your brand data as a JSON file. This includes all brand configurations, identity, and memory.

Import Brand Data

Upload a previously exported brand JSON file. This will add the brand to your collection.
